title: domain.Item struct + ItemType/Kind/Priority/Risk/Role enums + tests (CRITICAL PATH)
acceptance_criteria: Item struct exactly matches §14.2 fields and JSON tags.
Item round-trips through json.Marshal/Unmarshal byte-for-byte using a fixture from §5.
Required fields (schema_version, id, type, title, status, created_at, updated_at, version) round-trip even when optional fields are absent.
ItemType, Kind, Priority, Risk, and Role constants match §14.2 exactly; IsValid methods return false for unknown values; table-driven tests cover each enum value plus an unknown-value rejection.
Combined test coverage for item.go + types.go ≥90% (counts toward domain threshold).
